title: Survive the Infection
description: Smart zombies, structure generation, weapons, new food, and more. Survival at night becomes more difficult, and resource extraction turns into tense forays.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d770b4089b2326c3eccea654d16fcd945a898e07.png)
- You can support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/konche)
# ☣️ Walking Infection
Walking Infection is a hardcore zombie apocalypse survival modpack for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.
The world is no longer safe. Cities are overrun, nights are deadly, and the infection never sleeps.
This modpack focuses on:
- Zombie hordes
- Very dangerous nights
- Scarce resources
- Immersive atmosphere
- Slow, tense survival
# 🧟 Features
- Аggressive zombie hordes
- Enhanced zombie AI and awareness
- Abandoned and infected cities
- Increased night danger
- Survival-focused progression
- Immersive sound and environment mods
- Tuned configs for difficulty and atmosphere
# 🌆 World Generation (IMPORTANT)
1. Create a new world
1. Open the “Other” tab
1. Click “Cities”
1. Press “Customize”
1. Select Keerdm Zombie Essentials as the generation type
- **Without these settings**, cities and apocalypse content will **NOT** generate correctly.
# 🎮 Requirements
> Minecraft 1.20.1
> Forge.
> RAM: 8+ GB
# ⚠️ Important Notes!
- OptiFine is NOT included.
- Shaders are NOT included.
- Screenshots were taken with Insanity Shader Universal.
- Screenshots were taken with TZP resourcepack.
- Shaders can be installed manually if desired.
- Resourcepack can be installed manually if desired.
# 📜 Credits
All mods belong to their respective authors.
Full credit and respect to every developer whose work made this modpack possible.
